'''''Outpost''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

It was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] squadron present at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] during [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]]. ''Outpost'' was deployed as a rear guard, and thus escaped the battle undamaged.

{{Ship-stub}}
